scenario.summary: November close package — P&L, margin analysis, board deck
scenario.situation: November close is wrapping up. The Controller needs to produce the monthly reporting package by business day 5: consolidated P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow statement across all 6 entities, plus divisional margin analysis, variance commentary, and a management summary. Last month, the team spent 2.5 days assembling the data and formatting the reports. The CFO also needs a board-ready executive summary with Q4 outlook for an upcoming board call.
dataInputs: Q4 forecast v2 from Financial Forecasting agent
agentSteps: Pulls consolidated trial balance and automatically generates the standard reporting package: P&L by entity and consolidated, balance sheet, cash flow statement — formatted to Meridian's templates

Generates divisional margin analysis: Precision Components (37.2% margin, flat), Automation Systems (34.1%, down 180bps — Munich labor costs), Specialty Materials (29.8%, down 310bps — raw material spike). Flags Specialty Materials margin as below threshold
Auto-generates variance commentary: November revenue of $398M came in 2.1% below budget, primarily driven by a $6.2M shortfall in Automation Systems due to delayed European orders
Pulls Q4 forecast v2 from the Financial Forecasting agent and integrates the margin compression alert into the management summary

Produces a board-ready executive summary: 2-page document with key metrics, traffic-light status indicators, and forward-looking risks. Highlights the gross margin compression from 35.2% to 31.9% as the top concern
Generates all reports in 18 minutes vs. the typical 2.5 days of manual assembly
scenario.expectedOutput: Full monthly reporting package (P&L, BS, CF), divisional margin analysis with variance commentary, management summary, board-ready executive summary — all auto-generated and formatted

stats.label: Already use AI for financial analysis and reporting
Of performance mgmt time spent on data gathering — eliminated
